tasks.instruction: From the birthday cakes, add the cheapest chocolate cake that serves around 8–10 people and costs under $35 to your cart with the message “Happy Birthday Alex.”

tasks.instruction: From the family‑size cakes section, filter for cakes over $30, sort by lowest price, add the first two different cakes to your cart, then proceed to checkout and apply promo code SWEET10.
